display.name: RAM Usage
display.description: Percentage of Total Used RAM over the HANA Allocation Limit.

display.name: System Replication Used Async Log Shipping Buffer
CPU Usage
display.description: Average percent of CPU usage based on usage type.

display.name: System Replication Takeover History
display.description: System Replication Takeover history. When the values of end time cannot be collected, the duration time is presented as -1 and the end time as "N/A"

display.name: I/O Throughput
display.description: I/O Throughput  per Disk in KB/Sec

spec.query: (((sum by (host_ip) (label_replace(rate(node_disk_read_time_seconds_total{device!~"loop.*|ram.*|fd.*"}[5m]), "host_ip", "$1", "instance", "([^:]+):.*")) + sum by (host_ip) (label_replace(rate(node_disk_write_time_seconds_total{device!~"loop.*|ram.*|fd.*"}[5m]), "host_ip", "$1", "instance", "([^:]+):.*"))) / clamp_min((sum by (host_ip) (label_replace(rate(node_disk_reads_completed_total{device!~"loop.*|ram.*|fd.*"}[5m]), "host_ip", "$1", "instance", "([^:]+):.*")) + sum by (host_ip) (label_replace(rate(node_disk_writes_completed_total{device!~"loop.*|ram.*|fd.*"}[5m]), "host_ip", "$1", "instance", "([^:]+):.*"))), 0.001)) * 1000) * on (host_ip) group_left(pod) max by (host_ip, pod) (kube_pod_info{pod=~"$node_name"})

((sum by (host_ip) (label_replace(rate(node_disk_io_time_seconds_total{device!~"loop.*|ram.*|fd.*"}[5m]), "host_ip", "$1", "instance", "([^:]+):.*")) / clamp_min((sum by (host_ip) (label_replace(rate(node_disk_reads_completed_total{device!~"loop.*|ram.*|fd.*"}[5m]), "host_ip", "$1", "instance", "([^:]+):.*")) + sum by (host_ip) (label_replace(rate(node_disk_writes_completed_total{device!~"loop.*|ram.*|fd.*"}[5m]), "host_ip", "$1", "instance", "([^:]+):.*"))), 0.001)) * 1000) * on (host_ip) group_left(pod) max by (host_ip, pod) (kube_pod_info{pod=~"$node_name"})

display.name: CPU Usage
display.description: Average CPU busy time of all cores.

display.name: Queue Length (Number of Requests)
display.description: average queue length of the requests that were issued to the Disk Device

spec.query: (sum by (host_ip) (label_replace(node_disk_io_now{device!~"loop.*|ram.*|fd.*"}, "host_ip", "$1", "instance", "([^:]+):.*"))) * on (host_ip) group_left(pod) max by (host_ip, pod) (kube_pod_info{pod=~"$node_name"})

((sum by (host_ip) (label_replace(rate(node_disk_io_time_weighted_seconds_total{device!~"loop.*|ram.*|fd.*"}[5m]), "host_ip", "$1", "instance", "([^:]+):.*")) / clamp_min((sum by (host_ip) (label_replace(rate(node_disk_reads_completed_total{device!~"loop.*|ram.*|fd.*"}[5m]), "host_ip", "$1", "instance", "([^:]+):.*")) + sum by (host_ip) (label_replace(rate(node_disk_writes_completed_total{device!~"loop.*|ram.*|fd.*"}[5m]), "host_ip", "$1", "instance", "([^:]+):.*"))), 0.001)) * 1000) * on (host_ip) group_left(pod) max by (host_ip, pod) (kube_pod_info{pod=~"$node_name"})

display.name: Filesystem usage
display.description: Details HANA on how HANA uses the filesystem in its various directories

display.name: File system details
display.description: Details HANA on how HANA uses the filesystem in its various directories

display.name: Alert details
display.description: Alerts raised from the HANA database internal alerting system
